---
title: "Foundations of Outbreak Investigation"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01"
toc: True
---

This session introduces outbreak investigation, vaccination status, and vaccine effectiveness.

### Learning Objectives
<br>

- Explain why vaccine effectiveness matters in outbreak investigations.


- Interpret outbreak data by vaccination status.


- Calculate vaccine effectiveness using relative risk.



<br>

<br>

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Outbreak Investigation and Vaccine Effectiveness</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="01-outbreak-context/index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Outbreak Context</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
